titleStmt.title: SII 15.13: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 13. (B.K. No. 212 of 1926-27.) HIREHĀḶ, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken slab leaning against the front wall of the temple of Rāmēśvara.

This is dated the 5th regnal year of the king, Sādhāraṇa, Māgha-amāvāsye, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The date is irregular. The week-day was Friday on the said tithi and Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa occurred on Pausha ba. 8, Thursday, in the said cyclic year, corresponding to 1130 A.D., December 25.

It registers a grant of land for feeding the ascetics, made jointly by the Eighty-four Mahājanas of the agrahāra Kisuvāvi and the Forty-two Mahājanas of the agrahāra Honneyanūr. The gift land was entrusted into the hands of Sōmēśvara-paṇḍita, the āchārya of Piriya-maṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of B.K. 211 of 1926-27.
div.p:
svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyāna dhāraṇa maunā
nuṣṭhāna parāyaṇa japa samādhi śīḷasaṁpannarappa śrīmadagrahāraṁ kisuvāviyūroḍeya pramukha mahājanaveṇbatta
nālvaruṁ śrīmadagrahāraṁ hoṁneyanūra Ūroḍeya pramukha mahājanaṁgaḷu nālva tibbaru rḻdu
śrīmaccāḷukya bhūlōkamallavarṣada 5 neya sādhāraṇa saṁvatsara māghadamavāsya sōmavāramuttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇadaṁdu pi
riya maṭhadācāryyarappa śrīmatsōmēśvarapaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi tapōdhanerāhāradānakka yanū
ra dāriya haḷḷadiṁ paḍuvaluṁ mūḍalu veraḍūra sīmāsaṁbaṁdhavaṁ sarvvabādhā parihāraṁ māḍi biṭṭamattaru hattu sōmēśvarapaṇḍita
malliyaṇana kaiyyo mattareraḍu
malliyaṇna tā biṭṭa mattaroṁdu . Intīdharmmamaneraḍūruṁ pratipālisuvar . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 15.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
